data.title: As a plugin developer, the promptfoo eval infrastructure is fully removed so I am not confused by contradictory tooling
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Remove the entire promptfoo eval infrastructure: eval configs from 11 skill directories, run-skill-evals.sh, eval-daily.yml CI workflow and runner, SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md, generate-skill-eval.sh, the pre-commit eval config commit guard, promptfoo dependency, onboarding references, and CLAUDE.md references. Grep all prompts/skills/agents to verify no references to the old eval/promptfoo system remain.
**Why**: Two layers of LLM non-determinism (generator + grader) make promptfoo evals too flaky to gate commits. Leftover references create contradictory guidance.
**Scope**:
- IN: Delete eval configs from all 11 skill directories (evals/promptfooconfig.yaml)
- IN: Delete run-skill-evals.sh, generate-skill-eval.sh, SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md
- IN: Delete eval-daily.yml CI workflow and runner script
- IN: Remove pre-commit eval config commit guard from record-test-status.sh
- IN: Remove promptfoo from dependencies
- IN: Remove onboarding references to eval/promptfoo setup
- IN: Remove CLAUDE.md references to skill evals
- IN: Comprehensive grep to verify zero remaining promptfoo/eval references in prompts/skills/agents
- OUT: Adding replacement tests (separate story)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, no eval configs, eval scripts, eval CI workflows, or eval documentation remain in the codebase
  ← Satisfies: "The promptfoo eval infrastructure is fully removed"
- When this story is complete, a comprehensive grep confirms zero references to promptfoo or the old eval system in prompts, skills, and agents
  ← Satisfies: "all prompts, skills, and agents are verified to contain no references to the old eval/promptfoo system"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
  ← Satisfies: TDD done-of-done

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Removal sweep must be comprehensive — leftover references create contradictory agent guidance
- [Reliability] Pre-commit eval guard removal from record-test-status.sh must be coordinated with test gate logic

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
